turns.user_message: Online slots ate through money I needed for rent and I'm hiding it from my roommates. I feel like I'm watching myself do it and I can't stop clicking.

turns.user_message: Intrusive images keep popping into my head about driving into a barrier. I'm not going to do it—they scare me more than anything.
